texto: Naboo: "You've read all the books, but when it comes to the crunch, where are you?"Saboo: "The crunch! How dare you speak to me of the crunch? You know nothing of the crunch. You've never even been to the crunch!"Naboo: "Been there once."Saboo: "Oh, a little day trip 'round the crunch, we can all go there as tourists. 'Ooh, that's a bit of crunch-'"Naboo: "Shut it!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Julian Barratt que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Naboo: "You've read all the books, but when it comes to the crunch, where are you?"Saboo: "The cr…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, humour, crunch, com foco em reflexao.
